# Citizen

> Elevate your wiki

A beautiful, usable, and responsive MediaWiki skin

## Table of Contents

### Guide

- [Introduction](/guide/introduction.md): Introduction to the Citizen skin
- [Installation](/guide/installation.md): Installing the Citizen skin to your wiki

### Configuration

- [Configuration](/config.md): MediaWiki skin configuration for the Citizen skin.
- [Extensions and gadgets](/config/extensions.md): Extensions and gadgets that integrate well with Citizen

### Features

- [Command palette](/features/command-palette.md): A keyboard-driven palette for jumping to pages, running actions, and searching the wiki.
- [Overflow handling](/features/overflow.md): Stop wide tables and code blocks from pushing the whole page sideways — Citizen scrolls them in place, with navigation buttons and sticky headers.
- [Performance mode](/features/performance-mode.md): A lightweight mode that strips animations and visual effects for fast page loads.
- [Preferences](/features/preferences.md): A panel for personalizing the skin, extensible with on-wiki JSON or JavaScript.
- [Share](/features/share.md): Share the current page via the browser's native share sheet or a configurable grid of services.

### Customization

- [Theming](/customization/theming.md): Customizing the look and feel of Citizen
- [Recipes](/customization/recipes.md): Common customizations and CSS snippets for Citizen

### Reference

- [Classes](/reference/classes.md): The classes Citizen provides for formatting content and adding interactivity
- [Hooks](/reference/hooks.md): JavaScript hooks provided by Citizen for extensions and gadgets

### Community

- [Showcase](/community/showcase.md): A showcase of wikis using Citizen

### Project

- [Changelogs](/changelogs.md): Changelogs of all Citizen stable releases.
- [Migrating to Citizen 4](/guide/migrating-to-citizen-4.md): Preview the Citizen 4 changes and migrate your wiki before the release
- [Contribute](/contribute.md): How to contribute to the Citizen skin.
- [Preview channel](/contribute/preview-channel.md): How the preview channel ships upcoming Citizen features ahead of a stable release

### Other

- [Latest Changelog](/changelogs/latest.md): Changelog of the latest version of Citizen.
